
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
ref <- read_csv("REF_SPECIES.csv", col_types = cols(
  species = col_character(),
  JENKINS_SPGRPCD = col_character(),
  WDSG = col_double(),
  type = col_character()
))

ref <- ref %>%
  mutate(JENKINS_SPGRPCD = case_when(JENKINS_SPGRPCD == "10" & type == "H" ~ "8",
                                     JENKINS_SPGRPCD == "10" & type == "S" ~ "4",
                                     JENKINS_SPGRPCD != "10" ~ JENKINS_SPGRPCD),
         k = case_when(type == "H" ~ 11, type == "S" ~ 9),
         DensProp = case_when(type == "H" ~ 0.54, type == "S" ~ 0.92)) %>%
  select(species, type, JENKINS_SPGRPCD, WDSG, k, DensProp)
```
